title: tolumnia prionochila
intro: Tolumnia prionochila, also known as the "Yellow Fragrant" or "Dancing Ladies Orchid," is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Tolumnia prionochila include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can also help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
